text:
Created attachment 222235
svn diff

This module provides a generic method for polling RAID array
status for multiple systems and supports easy additions of
new backends via modules.

The currently supported systems are listed below.

FreeBSD GEOM mirror
FreeBSD GEOM RAID3
FreeBSD GEOM RAID
ZFS
Adaptec arcconf

check_raid provides a Nagios style check or LibreNMS JSON
style output.

WWW: https://metacpan.org/release/Device-RAID-Poller
